title: EARLY INTERVENTION AND EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: DAVID DOUGLAS SCHOOL DISTRICT 40 EARLY INTERVENTION AND EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Individually designed services for children and support for parents to enhance children's physical, cognitive, communication, social emotional, and/or adaptive development. 11300 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Ages 0-5 with a suspected developmental delay or disability Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 386-4919 ..12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 252-2900 Main phone Main phone (541) 386-4919 Hood River County Anne Cole [email protected] Main phone (503) 256-6500 Multnomah County Kevin Anderson [email protected] Main phone (541) 296-1478 Wasco County Pat Sublette [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River, Multnomah, and Wasco Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Services: Early Identification Programs Early Intervention for Children with Disabilities/Delays Pediatric Developmental Assessment Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - PEER PRESCHOOL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
